creator: destination_wellknown
caption:
I’m not complaining, but I didn’t think I would get that close to the Colosseum when I booked into this hotel in Rome 😅

The hotel is not your average city centre hotel, but more like a massive flat remodelled and turned into 5-8 different rooms (as far as I could see). So there’s nothing else at the hotel other than a small lobby with a front desk - the guy who checked us in was lovely and super helpful, though.

So they don’t offer breakfast, but you get a voucher that can be used at a café which is literally across the road from the Colosseum - a bit surreal to have your morning coffee and stare right at one of the most famous monuments of the world 😎   📍The hotel is called Colosseum Corner  I paid €175 when I stayed there for one night in the summer of 2022 which isn’t super cheap, but not too bad for Rome and the location ✌️

I’ve been to Rome 5-6 times, and I think I might swing by later this summer - it’s impossible to enough of the eternal city, in my opinion 😍

Have you been to Rome? What do you think about the city? 🇮🇹
